sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى مَنْفَذِ الْحُدُودِ بَعْدَ رِحْلَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ بِالْحَافِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na granični prijelaz nakon dugog putovanja autobusom.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the border crossing after a long bus journey.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفْتُ فِي طَابُورٍ أَمَامَ نَافِذَةِ ضَابِطِ الْجَوَازَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Stao sam u red ispred šaltera graničnog službenika.
sentences.translationEn: I stood in a queue in front of the passport control officer's window.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنِّي جَوَازَ سَفَرِي وَبِطَاقَةَ دُخُولِ الْبِلَادِ.
sentences.translation: Tražio je moju putovnicu i karticu za ulazak u zemlju.
sentences.translationEn: He asked for my passport and the entry card.

sentences.arabic: فَحَصَ الْجَوَازَ بِعِنَايَةٍ وَسَأَلَنِي عَنْ سَبَبِ زِيَارَتِي.
sentences.translation: Pažljivo je pregledao putovnicu i pitao me o razlogu posjete.
sentences.translationEn: He examined the passport carefully and asked about the purpose of my visit.

sentences.translation: Utisnuo je pečat u putovnicu i signalizirao mi da prođem.
sentences.translationEn: He stamped the passport and waved me through.
